mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_enrollment ( application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{roomId}, #{proposalId}, #{teacherUid}, #{studentUid}, #{status}, #{trialStartAt}, #{trialEndAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course_enrollment WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN ('APPLYING', 'WAIT_PAY', 'COMMUNICATING', 'TRIALING', 'TRIAL_REFUND_REVIEW', 'TEACHING') ) + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tutor_appointment WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN (2, 3) ) + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM live_class_session WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN ('CREATED', 'JOIN_OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') )

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE teacher_uid = #{teacherUid} ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, application_id, room_id, proposal_id, teacher_uid, student_uid, status, trial_start_at, trial_end_at, create_time, update_time FROM course_enrollment WHERE student_uid = #{studentUid} ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update:
UPDATE course_enrollment SET status = #{nextStatus},
proposal_id = #{proposalId},
trial_start_at = #{trialStartAt},
trial_end_at = #{trialEndAt},
update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
UPDATE course_enrollment SET room_id = #{roomId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND (room_id IS NULL OR room_id = 0)
